# Pi Capabilities

*Auto-generated — 2026-05-23 19:02 UTC · 64 tools*

- **analyze_media**(path, paths, question, kind, max_frames) — Analyze any media file — image(s), video, scanned PDF, or document. Auto-detects the right analysis from the file extens
- **browser_click**(selector, by_text) — Click an element by CSS selector. Set by_text=true to click by visible text instead.
- **browser_close**() — Close the browser instance. Useful to free resources after a session.
- **browser_evaluate**(js) — Run a JavaScript expression in the current page context and return its value.
- **browser_fill**(selector, value) — Type a value into a form field selected by CSS.
- **browser_get_text**(selector, max_chars) — Extract text from the current page or a specific element.
- **browser_open**(url, wait_until) — Open a URL in a headless Chromium browser. Returns page title and text preview. Use for web tasks that require JS render
- **browser_screenshot**(save_path) — Capture a screenshot of the current browser page. Returns the saved PNG path.
- **browser_wait**(selector, timeout) — Wait for an element matching the CSS selector to appear. Timeout in ms.
- **calendar_create**(title, start, end, description, location) — Create a Google Calendar event. Confirm with Ash before calling.
- **calendar_delete**(event_id) — Delete a calendar event by event ID. Confirm with Ash first.
- **calendar_search**(query, days) — Search Google Calendar events by keyword.
- **calendar_today**() — Get today's Google Calendar events.
- **calendar_upcoming**(days) — Get upcoming calendar events for the next N days (default 7).
- **computer_click**(x, y, button) — Click at (x, y) on Ash's desktop. Button: 'left' (default), 'right', or 'middle'.
- **computer_key**(key) — Press a single key or key combination (e.g. 'enter', 'ctrl+c', 'tab').
- **computer_screenshot**() — Take a screenshot of Ash's desktop. Returns the saved PNG path.
- **computer_scroll**(x, y, direction, clicks) — Scroll at (x, y). Direction: 'up'/'down'/'left'/'right'. Clicks = scroll units.
- **computer_type**(text) — Type text into the currently focused field on Ash's desktop.
- **create_file**(path, content) — Create a new file with given content.
- **create_ticket**(title, what_failed, component, severity, where_failed, suggested_fix) — File a self-improvement ticket to tickets/open/. Use when you discover a bug, gap, or improvement opportunity during a s
- **daily_briefing**(save_to_obsidian) — Generate Ash's daily briefing: weather, top news, markets, HN, research, and active L3 context. Saves to Obsidian daily 
- **detect_faces**(path) — Detect faces in an image. Returns count + bounding boxes. Uses MediaPipe (CPU, no GPU needed).
- **execute_bash**(command) — Execute bash command.
- **execute_python**(code) — Execute Python code. Returns output/errors.
- **fetch**(source, url, subreddit, query, permalink, channel_id, sort, count, max_chars, max_comments) — Fetch content from the web, Reddit, or Discord. source='web': fetch any URL (articles, docs, GitHub). source='reddit': b
- **generate_video**(prompt) — Generate a short video clip from a text prompt. Uses Replicate (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN) or HuggingFace (HF_TOKEN). Returns 
- **get_location**() — Detect Ash's current approximate location via IP geolocation (ipinfo.io fallback chain). Returns city, region, country, 
- **get_news**(category, count) — Get recent news headlines. Categories: global | tech | business | science | ai
- **get_session_stats**() — Return live stats for the current session: turns, cost, tokens, uptime. Use to answer 'how much have we spent?' or 'what
- **get_stocks**(symbols) — Get live stock/crypto prices from Yahoo Finance. Returns price and % change.
- **get_tech_updates**(count) — Get latest HN front-page stories and ArXiv AI/ML/NLP research papers.
- **get_weather**(location) — Get current weather for any location. Empty location = auto-detect from IP.
- **gmail_inbox**(max_results) — Get Gmail inbox summary: unread count and top unread messages.
- **gmail_read**(message_id) — Read the full body of a specific Gmail message by ID.
- **gmail_search**(query, max_results) — Search Gmail messages. Use Gmail search syntax e.g. 'is:unread from:boss' or 'subject:invoice'.
- **gmail_send**(to, subject, body) — Send an email. Ash must explicitly confirm before calling this.
- **image_gen**(prompt, backend, width, height, save_path) — Generate an image from a text prompt and save it to disk. Returns the absolute file path. Backend 'pollinations' is free
- **list_registered_faces**() — List all registered faces with metadata.
- **listen**(seconds) — Record audio from the microphone and transcribe to text using Whisper STT. Use when the user speaks input or when voice 
- **memory_delete**(target, soft) — Delete from memory. Soft delete = archive to L2.
- **memory_read**(query, tier) — Search Ash's persistent memory. Default: searches L3 (hot context) first — if found, returns immediately. Falls back to 
- **memory_search_semantic**(query, limit, threshold) — Semantic search over L2 memory using Gemini embeddings + cosine similarity. Catches paraphrases that lexical memory_read
- **memory_write**(content, tier, importance, category, expiry, source) — Write to memory. Auto-verifies.
- **modify_file**(path, old_str, new_str) — Modify file (including self). String must be unique.
- **obsidian_append**(path, content) — Append markdown text to an existing Obsidian note (creates it if absent).
- **obsidian_read**(path) — Read a note from Ash's Obsidian vault by path (relative to vault root).
- **obsidian_search**(query, max_results) — Full-text search across Ash's Obsidian vault. Returns matching note paths and excerpts.
- **obsidian_write**(path, content) — Create or overwrite a note in Ash's Obsidian vault.
- **read_document**(path, max_chars) — Extract text and tables from PDF, DOCX, PPTX, or plain text files. Returns full text content.
- **read_file**(path) — Read file contents.
- **recognize_face**(path, threshold) — Recognize known faces in an image. Returns matched names + confidence. Requires register_face first.
- **reflect**(note) — Write a metacognitive reflection note for the current session. Use every ~10 turns, after solving a complex problem, or 
- **refresh_awareness**() — Force-refresh the full live awareness snapshot (weather, news, stocks, research). Use when Pi needs the absolute latest 
- **register_face**(path, name) — Register a person's face for later recognition. Pass a clear photo and their name.
- **repo_map**(query, max_files) — Return a ranked symbol map of Pi's codebase — which files define which classes and functions. Use before editing to unde
- **scholar_search**(query, count) — Search academic papers via Semantic Scholar (free). Returns titles, authors, year, abstract, citation count.
- **search_codebase**(query, file_pattern, max_results) — Search Pi's own source files for a regex pattern. Use to find function definitions, understand how a subsystem works, or
- **speak**(text, rate) — Speak text aloud on Ash's computer using text-to-speech. Use for reading out important updates, reminders, or results. N
- **system_introspect**() — Return live system state: total interactions logged, open/closed ticket counts, solution count, last solution ID, L3 cac
- **telegram_send**(text, chat_id) — Send a message to Ash's Telegram. Use to push important updates, completed task notifications, or alerts when Ash is awa
- **transcribe_file**(path) — Transcribe an audio file to text using Whisper STT.
- **watcher**(action, name, type, config, alert_msg) — Manage background watchers that alert Ash when events fire. action='add': register watcher (name, type, config, alert_ms
- **web_search**(query, max_results) — Search the web via DuckDuckGo for current information. Use when you need facts beyond your training cutoff (Aug 2025), l
